text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchl√§den allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey B√ºcher zu haben, so in Nancy durch S√ºbscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appell√© Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> . <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; di√º gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. √† <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. √† <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4√∞.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. √† <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"1) Changed the first two `<PRIZE>` tags to `<PRICE>` for consistency with the schema's price tagging (fl. 24 and fl. 18). 2) In the last BIBL, the opening tag was `<PRIZE>` while the closing tag was `</PRICE>` — corrected the opening tag to `<PRICE>` so the element is well-formed (fl. 5. 24. xr.). 3) The mismatched tags in the fourth BIBL (`<PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE>` was correct as a pair but inconsistent with PRICE) were normalized to `<PRICE>` to keep all price elements uniform. 4) Added a missing space before `<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT>` (\".<FORMAT>\" → \". <FORMAT>\") for readability. The garbled/mojibake characters (e.g. √§, √º, √©, √†, √∞) were left as-is since they are encoding artifacts of the source OCR and not XML structural errors; they were not counted as fixes. The total number of structural tag corrections is 5: three PRIZE→PRICE on the first, second and fourth BIBL price values, one fix of the mismatched PRIZE/PRICE opening tag in the last BIBL, plus the spacing normalization."}
